verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So many precious seeds are sown throughout the Land Till they've come to reach a lovely harvest strand The thorns and briars now are trying everything To choke the life till no more fruitfulness they bring

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I won't give up until I wear a crown I won't give up till I lay my burdens down Until my blessed Savior's Face I see I'll never give up here I won't give up until our Lord I'll crown

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We're all invited to the Marriage of the Lamb To be a Bride that only for His Word will stand Not to make more of these worldly things than Him If we give up we'll surely miss everything
